sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation found for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Ship Speed Control
special_mechanics.description: Player can change the speed of their ship at any time for easier maneuverability

special_mechanics.name: Vertical Scrolling Exploration
special_mechanics.description: Player can scroll the screen vertically and horizontally to reveal larger playing fields and different enemy waves

special_mechanics.name: Thunder Sword
special_mechanics.description: Powerful attack unlocked mid-game that deals massive damage to enemies; requires two satellite ships to activate

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Multiple weapons including missiles and lasers with different firing patterns; each weapon has advantages and drawbacks for different situations

special_mechanics.name: Satellite Ships
special_mechanics.description: Power-up items that revolve around the player's ship and multiply firepower

tier_notes: Tier 1 qualitative data: This is a horizontal shoot 'em up with extensive vertical scrolling. No specific physics parameters (gravity, acceleration, jump mechanics) are documented because these are not relevant to the shmup genre. The game emphasizes responsive ship movement control with adjustable speed settings rather than character physics. Graphics, parallax scrolling, and weapon variety are the documented gameplay highlights.
